public.headline: Step into the same quiet room each time you focus.
public.description: Sign in, choose a goal, and let FocusOS keep the session calm while you work.

login.title: Welcome back to your focus space
login.description: Pick up where you left off and settle into your next session.

register.title: Create your focus space
register.description: Set up a calm place for sessions, reflection, and gentle attention tracking.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive recovery instructions
forgotPassword.cancel: Cancel and return to Sign In
forgotPassword.successDescription: We've dispatched password reset instructions to
forgotPassword.successNote: Please check your inbox and spam folder. If the email exists in our records, you will receive a secure token to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your new credentials below to secure your account
resetPassword.invalidDescription: No reset token was found in the URL.
resetPassword.invalidNote: Password reset actions require a unique, secure token. Please request a new recovery link from the Forgot Password page.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your credentials have been successfully updated
resetPassword.successNote: Your password has been changed. You can now use your new credentials to sign in and enter your FocusOS sanctuary.
resetPassword.cancel: Cancel and return to Sign In

errors.unauthorized: Please sign in again to continue.
errors.recoveryFailed: Failed to request recovery link. Please try again.
errors.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
errors.missingToken: Reset token is missing or expired. Please request another link.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMin6: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
